scope: local filesystem/repository audit plus 2026-04-25 strict GQA artifact acquisition/preprocessing update; no model training and no architecture changes
verdict: local environment ready for targeted VCR artifact acquisition

ready_locally: Core entrypoints, dataset validators/preparers, inference/training entrypoints
Legacy baseline configs for VCR QA, VCR QAR, and GQA
Paper-equation configs that compose with Hydra dry-run
Paper-specific model code: PaperVCRModel, PaperGQAModel, PaperMultiRelationGATLayer
Paper scheduler and LM/GNN optimizer param-group helper
Strict GQA canonical package at data/gqa with 1842-answer vocab, 624-relation vocab, metadata, d_kg=600 graphs, and graph_edge_types
GQA visual HDF5 files with first-sample shape 100 x 2048 via live symlinks to data/gqa_legacy_latest
Raw GQA preprocessing inputs: official scene graphs, object features, object info JSON, balanced questions, and GloVe 840B 300d
ConceptNet Numberbatch and ConceptNet assertions archives
Local roberta-large directory and Hugging Face cache snapshot
missing_locally: All required VCR real data and processed VCR HDF5 artifacts
VinVL checkpoint, extracted region features, and p-node cache
Paper/checkpoint artifacts for reproduced model weights
mismatched_locally: Legacy GQA artifacts are preserved at data/gqa_legacy_20260425_105927 and remain present but mismatched; canonical data/gqa is strict/runtime-valid
Paper-equation configs compose, but their paper subgraph batch keys are not emitted by current datasets/local artifacts
summary.main_next_action: Acquire VCR raw/processed artifacts next; GQA strict artifacts are already ready locally and runtime-valid.

code_config.git_note: Several paper/exactness files are present as local untracked/modified files; this audit records local availability, not git commit status.

data/gqa/knowledge_graphs/train_graphs.h.validation: canonical validate_gqa_data.py passed with 60 OK, 0 warnings, 0 errors

data/gqa/knowledge_graphs/val_graphs.h5.validation: canonical validate_gqa_data.py passed with 60 OK, 0 warnings, 0 errors

conceptnet_numberbatch.exactness_note: Does not close QA-GNN 1024-d concept embedding blocker.

conceptnet_assertions.exactness_note: Useful for preprocessing, but not enough to reproduce paper concept retrieval exactly.

gqa_official_scene_graphs.exactness_note: Used to rebuild strict GQA graph artifacts.

gqa_official_object_features.exactness_note: Used for strict GQA visual/object alignment.

glove_840b_300d.exactness_note: Used to build 600-d textual scene-graph node features.

roberta_large.config_note: Configs use text_encoder_name: roberta-large, so runtime depends on HF cache resolution unless overridden to data/roberta-large.

smoke_inference_outputs.exactness_note: Contains small inference output .pth files with pred_label/label only; not model checkpoints.

present_and_valid: GQA answer vocab size 1842 with idx_to_answer and metadata
GQA relation vocab has 624 contiguous relation ids and required special relations
GQA train/val question JSON counts match graph root counts
GQA visual feature first samples are 100 x 2048 float32
GQA strict knowledge graphs are d_kg=600 and include graph_edge_types
GQA canonical data/gqa validation passed: 60 OK, 0 warnings, 0 errors; one-batch forward logits=(1, 1842)
Hydra composition for baseline and paper configs
present_but_mismatched: Legacy GQA backup at data/gqa_legacy_20260425_105927 remains d_kg=300 and lacks graph_edge_types, but is no longer canonical
Paper-equation runtime batch contract requires split visual/textual or scene/concept subgraphs not emitted by local artifacts
unknown: Exact paper training/evaluation numbers; no long training/evaluation was run

VCR raw data.after_acquisition: requires preprocessing unless already acquired in repo contract format

VCR Tang scene graph outputs.status: missing and requires separate integration work
VCR Tang scene graph outputs.after_acquisition: requires checkpoint execution on VCR images and serialization to split scene-graph contract

VCR VinVL p-node features.status: missing and requires separate integration work
VCR VinVL p-node features.after_acquisition: requires VG region retrieval/feature extraction and p_features cache

VCR QA-GNN concept path.status: not solvable by file download alone
VCR QA-GNN concept path.after_acquisition: requires QA-GNN embedding path plus deterministic concept retrieval details not specified in the paper

GQA strict d_kg=600 graphs with graph_ed.after_acquisition: closed on 2026-04-25; canonical data/gqa validation passed with 60 OK, 0 warnings, 0 errors

GQA relation vocab.after_acquisition: closed on 2026-04-25; relation_count_total=624, model.num_relations must remain >= 624

GQA metadata.after_acquisition: closed on 2026-04-25; train/val visual and KG metadata are under data/gqa/metadata

RoBERTa-large.after_acquisition: no download needed; optional config override can point directly to data/roberta-large

Joint VCR training mechanics.after_acquisition: not solved by artifact download; paper does not specify task mixing/loss weighting

recommended_steps: Step 1: Optionally run a short GQA smoke/runtime command on canonical data/gqa if the next phase needs an executable sanity check; claim only runtime-valid, not paper reproduction.
Step 2: Acquire VCR raw train/val/test annotations and image/feature inputs under the VCR license; then prepare baseline VCR artifacts or import an already processed private package.
Step 3: Validate VCR baseline artifacts with scripts/validate_vcr_data.py before any VCR training or inference claim.
Step 4: For strict paper-path VCR, acquire Tang SG and VinVL assets, then plan a separate integration/preprocessing pass for split scene/concept graph contract and p-node/concept retrieval caches.
Step 5: Decide separately whether to prioritize VCR baseline runtime-valid data, GQA training smoke, or paper-equation split-subgraph integration; these close different blockers.
